description: HP/Agilent 53131A 225 MHz universal frequency counter (3-channel optional). Programmed via SCPI 1992.0 over GPIB/RS-232. Command set is shared with the 53132A.

commands.name: calibration_query
commands.description: Performs an internal interpolator self-calibration and returns a value indicating whether it completed without error.

commands.name: clear_status
commands.description: Clears the status data structures (event registers and error queue).

commands.name: define_device_trigger
commands.description: Defines INIT, FETC?, READ?, or nothing to be executed when the counter receives a GET or *TRG.

commands.name: define_macro
commands.description: Assigns a sequence of zero or more commands/queries to a macro label. No query form.

commands.name: enable_macro
commands.description: Enables (non-zero) or disables (zero) expansion of macros.

commands.name: event_status_enable
commands.description: Sets or queries the Standard Event Status Enable Register.

commands.name: event_status_register_query
commands.description: Queries the Standard Event Status Register.

commands.name: get_macro_contents_query
commands.description: Queries the current definition of a defined macro label.

commands.name: identify
commands.description: Queries the counter identification (manufacturer, model, serial, firmware).

commands.name: learn_macro_query
commands.description: Queries the currently defined macro labels.

commands.name: operation_complete
commands.description: Sets the operation complete bit in the Standard Event Status Register when all pending operations finish.

commands.name: operation_complete_query
commands.description: Places an ASCII 1 in the output queue when all pending operations are completed.

commands.name: option_query
commands.description: Identifies the options installed in the counter.

commands.name: purge_macro
commands.description: Deletes all macros previously defined using *DMC.

commands.name: recall
commands.description: Restores the counter state from a copy stored in non-volatile memory (registers 0 through 20).

commands.name: reset
commands.description: Resets the counter to a known state optimized for remote operation.

commands.name: save
commands.description: Stores the current counter state in non-volatile memory (registers 1 through 20).

commands.name: service_request_enable
commands.description: Sets or queries the Service Request Enable register.

commands.name: status_byte_query
commands.description: Queries the Status Byte and Master Summary Status bit.

commands.name: trigger
commands.description: Device-specific analog of the IEEE 488.1 GET. Initiates a measurement unless *DDT redefined the device trigger.

commands.name: self_test_query
commands.description: Executes an internal self-test and reports the results.

commands.name: wait
commands.description: Makes the counter wait until all pending operations complete before executing following commands.

commands.name: abort
commands.description: Aborts the measurement in progress. Event; no query.

commands.name: configure
commands.description: Configures the instrument to perform the specified measurement without initiating it.

commands.name: measure_frequency
commands.description: Configures, initiates, and queries a frequency measurement on the specified channel.

commands.name: measure_frequency_ratio
commands.description: Measures the frequency ratio between two channels (1:2, 1:3, 2:1, or 3:1).

commands.name: measure_period
commands.description: Measures period on channel 1, 2, or 3.

commands.name: measure_time_interval
commands.description: Measures the time interval from channel 1 to channel 2.

commands.name: measure_phase
commands.description: Measures the phase of channel 1 relative to channel 2.

commands.name: measure_duty_cycle
commands.description: Measures the positive duty cycle on channel 1.

commands.name: measure_fall_time
commands.description: Measures the fall time on channel 1.

commands.name: measure_rise_time
commands.description: Measures the rise time on channel 1.

commands.name: measure_negative_width
commands.description: Measures the negative pulse width on channel 1.

commands.name: measure_positive_width
commands.description: Measures the positive pulse width on channel 1.

commands.name: measure_voltage_maximum
commands.description: Measures the maximum voltage on channel 1 or 2.

commands.name: measure_voltage_minimum
commands.description: Measures the minimum voltage on channel 1 or 2.

commands.name: measure_voltage_ptpeak
commands.description: Measures the peak-to-peak voltage on channel 1 or 2.

commands.name: configure_totalize_timed
commands.description: Configures a timed totalize measurement on channel 1 over a gate time.

commands.name: configure_totalize_continuous
commands.description: Configures a continuous totalize measurement on channel 1. Only allowed with CONFigure.

commands.name: read
commands.description: Initiates a measurement and queries the result (performs a FETCh on fresh data).

commands.name: fetch
commands.description: Queries the result of the current measurement without re-acquiring.

commands.name: initiate_immediate
commands.description: Initiates the number of measurements specified by TRIGger:COUNt:AUTO. Event; no query.

commands.name: initiate_continuous
commands.description: Enables or disables continuously initiated measurements.

commands.name: initiate_auto
commands.description: AUTO ON stops measuring on a limit test failure; AUTO OFF disables the automatic stop.

commands.name: trigger_count_auto
commands.description: Controls the number of measurements made when INIT:IMM is performed.

commands.name: input_attenuation
commands.description: Sets the input attenuation (1 or 10) for channel 1 or 2.

commands.name: input_coupling
commands.description: Sets the input coupling (AC or DC) for channel 1 or 2.

commands.name: input_filter_state
commands.description: Enables or disables the low pass filter in the measurement signal path for channel 1 or 2.

commands.name: input_filter_frequency_query
commands.description: Returns the cutoff frequency (Hz) of the low pass filter.

commands.name: input_impedance
commands.description: Sets the input impedance (50 ohm or 1 Mohm) for channel 1 or 2.

commands.name: input3_coupling_query
commands.description: Returns the channel 3 input coupling. Query only.

commands.name: input3_impedance_query
commands.description: Returns the channel 3 input impedance. Query only.

commands.name: sense_data_query
commands.description: Returns the current measurement result data of the SENSe subsystem (no scale or offset applied).

commands.name: sense_function
commands.description: Selects the sensor function to be sensed by the instrument.

commands.name: sense_event_level_absolute
commands.description: Sets the trigger level (V) at the center of the hysteresis window for event channel 1 or 2.

commands.name: sense_event_level_auto
commands.description: Sets the auto-trigger enable for event channel 1 or 2.

commands.name: sense_event_level_relative
commands.description: Sets the percentage (0-100%) of the peak-to-peak range at which the instrument auto-triggers.

commands.name: sense_event_hysteresis_relative
commands.description: Sets the size of the hysteresis window as a percentage of allowable hysteresis for event channel 1 or 2.

commands.name: sense_event_slope
commands.description: Sets which edge (POSitive or NEGative) of the input signal is considered an event for channel 1 or 2.

commands.name: sense_event2_feed
commands.description: Sets common/separate mode for time interval. INPut2 = separate, INPut1 = common.

commands.name: sense_event3_level_query
commands.description: Returns the channel 3 input trigger level. Query only.

commands.name: sense_event3_slope_query
commands.description: Returns the channel 3 input edge considered an event. Query only.

commands.name: sense_frequency_expected
commands.description: Specifies the approximate expected frequency of the signal at channel 1, 2, or 3.

commands.name: sense_frequency_expected_auto
commands.description: Configures the counter to perform a pre-measurement step to determine the approximate frequency automatically.

commands.name: sense_frequency_arm_start_slope
commands.description: Sets the slope of the external start arm signal for frequency, ratio, and period measurements.

commands.name: sense_frequency_arm_start_source
commands.description: Sets the start arm source for frequency, ratio, and period measurements.

commands.name: sense_frequency_arm_stop_source
commands.description: Sets the stop arm source for frequency, ratio, and period measurements.

commands.name: sense_frequency_arm_stop_slope
commands.description: Sets the slope of the external stop arm signal for frequency, ratio, and period measurements.

commands.name: sense_frequency_arm_stop_digits
commands.description: Sets the resolution in digits used in arming frequency, ratio, and period measurements (when STOP:SOUR DIGits).

commands.name: sense_frequency_arm_stop_timer
commands.description: Sets the gate time used in arming frequency, ratio, and period measurements (when STOP:SOUR TIMer).

commands.name: sense_phase_arm_start_slope
commands.description: Sets the slope of the external start arm signal for phase measurements.

commands.name: sense_phase_arm_start_source
commands.description: Sets the start arm source for phase measurements.

commands.name: sense_tinterval_arm_start_slope
commands.description: Sets the slope of the external start arm signal for time interval, rise/fall time, duty cycle, and pulse width.

commands.name: sense_tinterval_arm_start_source
commands.description: Sets the start arm source for time interval measurements.

commands.name: sense_tinterval_arm_stop_source
commands.description: Sets the stop arm (delay) source for time interval measurements.

commands.name: sense_tinterval_arm_stop_timer
commands.description: Sets the delay time used to delay the stop arm for time interval measurements (when STOP:SOUR TIMer).

commands.name: sense_totalize_arm_start_slope
commands.description: Sets the slope of the external start arm signal for totalize measurements.

commands.name: sense_totalize_arm_start_source
commands.description: Sets the start arm source for totalize measurements.

commands.name: sense_totalize_arm_stop_slope
commands.description: Sets the slope of the external stop arm signal for totalize measurements.

commands.name: sense_totalize_arm_stop_source
commands.description: Sets the stop arm source for totalize measurements.

commands.name: sense_totalize_arm_stop_timer
commands.description: Sets the gate time used in totalize measurements (when STOP:SOUR TIMer).

commands.name: sense_roscillator_source
commands.description: Selects the reference timebase (INTernal or EXTernal).

commands.name: sense_roscillator_source_auto
commands.description: Enables or disables automatic selection of the reference timebase.

commands.name: sense_roscillator_external_check
commands.description: Enables checking the validity and presence of the external reference.

commands.name: sense_roscillator_external_frequency_query
commands.description: Returns the frequency value of the external reference oscillator. Query only.

commands.name: calc_data_query
commands.description: Returns the scaled/offset measurement result. Query only.

commands.name: calc_feed
commands.description: Sets the data flow fed into the CALCulate block.

commands.name: calc_immediate
commands.description: Causes the counter to recalculate existing data without re-acquiring.

commands.name: calc_immediate_auto
commands.description: Enables or disables automatic post-processing for CALCulate.

commands.name: calc_math_state
commands.description: Enables or disables math (scale/offset) processing. Must be enabled for other CALC settings.

commands.name: calc_math_expression_select
commands.description: Sets the name of the selected math expression (equation).

commands.name: calc_math_expression_catalog_query
commands.description: Returns the name of the defined equation, SCALE_OFFSET. Query only.

commands.name: calc2_feed
commands.description: Sets the data flow fed into the CALCulate2 (limit testing) block.

commands.name: calc2_immediate
commands.description: Causes the counter to recalculate existing data for limit testing without re-acquiring. Event; no query.

commands.name: calc2_immediate_auto
commands.description: Enables or disables automatic post-processing for CALCulate2.

commands.name: calc2_limit_state
commands.description: Enables the limit test. Must be enabled for other CALC2 settings to be used.

commands.name: calc2_limit_lower
commands.description: Sets the lower limit used in limit testing.

commands.name: calc2_limit_upper
commands.description: Sets the upper limit used in limit testing.

commands.name: calc2_limit_display
commands.description: Sets whether the measurement display is numeric or symbolic (on a graph).

commands.name: calc2_limit_fail_query
commands.description: Returns 0 (pass) or 1 (fail) for the last tested measurement. Query only.

commands.name: calc2_limit_clear_immediate
commands.description: Clears the limit test results. Event; no query.

commands.name: calc2_limit_clear_auto
commands.description: Enables automatic clearing of limit test results.

commands.name: calc2_limit_fcount_lower_query
commands.description: Returns the number of limit test failures at the lower limit. Query only.

commands.name: calc2_limit_fcount_upper_query
commands.description: Returns the number of limit test failures at the upper limit. Query only.

commands.name: calc2_limit_fcount_total_query
commands.description: Returns the total number of measurements that failed the limit test. Query only.

commands.name: calc2_limit_pcount_total_query
commands.description: Returns the total number of measurements that passed the limit test. Query only.

commands.name: calc3_data_query
commands.description: Returns the statistic result specified by CALC3:AVER:TYPE. Query only.

commands.name: calc3_feed
commands.description: Sets the data flow fed into the CALCulate3 (statistics) block.

commands.name: calc3_average_state
commands.description: Enables or disables statistics post-processing. Must be enabled for other CALC3 settings.

commands.name: calc3_average_count
commands.description: Selects the number of measurements to combine for statistics.

commands.name: calc3_average_count_current_query
commands.description: Returns the current number of data values collected so far. Query only.

commands.name: calc3_average_type
commands.description: Selects which statistic appears in CALC3:DATA? and on the front-panel display.

commands.name: calc3_average_all_query
commands.description: Returns all four statistics results (mean, standard deviation, maximum, minimum). Query only.

commands.name: calc3_average_clear
commands.description: Clears the statistics results and statistics count. Event; no query.

commands.name: calc3_lfilter_state
commands.description: Sets the statistics limit-filter enable.

commands.name: calc3_lfilter_lower
commands.description: Sets the statistics filter lower limit.

commands.name: calc3_lfilter_upper
commands.description: Sets the statistics filter upper limit.

commands.name: calc3_path_query
commands.description: Returns the statistics path (LFIL, AVER). Query only.

commands.name: calibration_all_query
commands.description: Causes an internal interpolator self-calibration. Query only.

commands.name: calibration_count_query
commands.description: Returns the number of times the counter has been calibrated. Query only.

commands.name: calibration_data
commands.description: Transfers the calibration data (input gain, input offset, reference oscillator, time interval).

commands.name: calibration_security_code
commands.description: Sets the calibration security code. No query.

commands.name: calibration_security_state
commands.description: Enables or prevents calibration. Query returns 0 (unsecure) or 1 (secure).

commands.name: diag_cal_input_gain_auto
commands.description: ONCE calibrates the input gain for the specified channel.

commands.name: diag_cal_input_offset_auto
commands.description: ONCE calibrates the input offset for the specified channel.

commands.name: diag_cal_interpolator_auto
commands.description: ONCE calibrates the interpolators.

commands.name: diag_cal_roscillator_auto
commands.description: ONCE calibrates the timebase (requires medium or high stability oscillator option).

commands.name: diag_cal_status_query
commands.description: Returns the status of the last calibration: 0 = pass, 1 = fail. Query only.

commands.name: diag_cal_tinterval_quick
commands.description: Calibrates out channel 1/2 electrical path length differences. Event; no query.

commands.name: diag_cal_tinterval_fine
commands.description: Four-step fine calibration of channel 1/2 electrical path length differences. Event; no query.

commands.name: display_enable
commands.description: Controls whether the whole display is visible.

commands.name: display_menu_state
commands.description: Sets the counter to switch from the menu display to the result display.

commands.name: display_text_feed
commands.description: Sets which data flow is fed into the display (CALCulate2 = measurement, CALCulate3 = statistics).

commands.name: display_text_radix
commands.description: Sets the character used to separate integral and fractional portions of a number.

commands.name: format_data
commands.description: Sets the data format for transferring numeric information.

commands.name: hcopy_continuous
commands.description: Enables or disables printing of results.

commands.name: memory_delete_macro
commands.description: Deletes the macro with the specified name. Event; no query.

commands.name: memory_free_macro_query
commands.description: Returns memory usage and availability for macro data. Query only.

commands.name: memory_nstates_query
commands.description: Returns the number of available *SAV/*RCL states in the instrument. Query only.

commands.name: trace_catalog_query
commands.description: Returns the list of intrinsic constants. Query only.

commands.name: trace_offset
commands.description: Sets or queries the offset value used in scale/offset math.

commands.name: trace_scale
commands.description: Sets or queries the scale value used in scale/offset math.

commands.name: status_operation_condition_query
commands.description: Queries the Operation Condition Status Register. Query only.

commands.name: status_operation_enable
commands.description: Sets the Operation Event Status Enable Register; query returns the Operation Event Status Register.

commands.name: status_operation_ntransition
commands.description: Sets the negative transition filter for the Operation status reporting structure.

commands.name: status_operation_ptransition
commands.description: Sets the positive transition filter for the Operation status reporting structure.

commands.name: status_questionable_condition_query
commands.description: Queries the Questionable Data Condition Status Register. Query only.

commands.name: status_questionable_enable
commands.description: Sets the Questionable Data Event Status Enable Register; query returns the Questionable Data Event Status Register.

commands.name: status_questionable_ntransition
commands.description: Sets the negative transition filter for the Questionable Data status reporting structure.

commands.name: status_questionable_ptransition
commands.description: Sets the positive transition filter for the Questionable Data status reporting structure.

commands.name: status_preset
commands.description: Presets the enable registers and transition filters of the Operation and Questionable structures. Event; no query.

commands.name: system_error_query
commands.description: Queries the oldest error in the error queue and removes it (first in, first out). Query only.

commands.name: system_version_query
commands.description: Returns the SCPI version number with which the counter complies. Query only.

commands.name: system_key
commands.description: Simulates the pressing of a front-panel key.

commands.name: system_key_log_query
commands.description: Returns a comma-separated list of integers representing all entries in the key queue. Query only.

commands.name: system_comm_serial_control_dtr
commands.description: Sets the usage of the DTR line of the RS-232 port.

commands.name: system_comm_serial_baud
commands.description: Sets the RS-232 baud rate.

commands.name: system_comm_serial_pace
commands.description: Sets the RS-232 software pacing scheme.

commands.name: system_comm_serial_parity
commands.description: Sets the RS-232 parity scheme.
